records.ety: [Dan. sisgen; cf. Sw. siska, G. zeisig, D. sijsje; of Slav. origin; cf. Pol. czy.]

defs: A small green and yellow European finch (Spinus spinus, or Carduelis spinus); -- called also aberdevine.
The American pinefinch (Spinus pinus); -- called also pine siskin. See Pinefinch.
notes: ☞ The name is applied also to several other related species found in Asia and South America.
